zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton於1430年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特普德萊托時，他的父親Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton20歲，母親Elizabeth Pydel15歲。他於1445年與Elizabeth Clevedon在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿瑟爾哈普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1485年9月14日在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿瑟爾哈普頓享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特普德萊托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton于1430年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特普德萊托时，他的父亲Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton20岁，母亲Elizabeth Pydel15岁。他于1445年与Elizabeth Clevedon在英国英格兰多瑟特阿瑟爾哈普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1485年9月14日在英国英格兰多瑟特阿瑟爾哈普頓享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特普德萊托。

nameMeanings.name: Martin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
English: variant of   Marton  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

variants.name: Marczewski
meanings: Polish: habitational name for someone from Marcewo (formerly also Marczewo) in Greater Poland Voivodeship. Alternatively, a derivative of the personal name Marc, Marcz, a pet form of Marcin, Marek (see Martin , Mark ).

variants.name: Marciniak
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Eugeniusz, Ewa, Agnieszka, Bartosz, Boleslaw, Ignatius, Jaroslaw, Jerzy, Krystyna, Ryszard, Slawomir, Stanislawa.
Polish: patronymic from the personal name Marcin (see Martin ).

variants.name: Marak
meanings: Czech:
(Marák): from a pet form of the personal names Martin or Marek .
(Mařák): metronymic from the female personal name Máří, Czech form of Maria . It may also denoted the husband of a woman named Máří.

variants.name: Machain
meanings: Basque: Castilianized form of Matxain, a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with a diminutive of the personal name Martin .

variants.name: Maertens
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: patronymic from the personal name Maerten, a variant of Martin .
North German (Märtens): see Martens .

variants.name: Marcin
meanings: Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia), and Polish: from Marcin, a personal name equivalent to Martin . In Poland this is the most usual form as a personal name, but the surname is very rare there, while in Slovakia, where Marcin is a dialect form of the name Martin, the situation is opposite.
American shortened form of Polish Marcinkiewicz and other derivatives of the personal name Marcin (see 1 above).
In some cases possibly also French: from a vernacular form of the personal name Marcien, derived from the Latin surname Marcianus, popularized through the cult of a local saint.

variants.name: Macho
meanings: Spanish: nickname from macho ‘male; mule’ (from Latin masculus ‘male, masculine’), applied either to denote a virile, strong man or alternatively an idiot.
Spanish: possibly also a nickname for a forceful person or a metonymic occupational name for a smith, from macho ‘sledgehammer’ (from Latin marculus ‘hammer’).
Slovak: from a derivative of the personal name   Martin  .

variants.name: Marcinowski
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Aleksander, Bogdan, Jerzy, Zbigniew, Zigmund.
Polish: habitational name for someone from any of the places called Marcinów, Marcinowa, Marcinowice, or any of numerous other places in Poland named with the personal name Marcin (see Martin ).

variants.name: Marcinkiewicz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Henryk, Beata, Elzbieta, Janina.
Polish: patronymic from the personal name Marcinek, a petform of Marcin (see Martin ).

variants.name: Mar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Gim, Wai, Fong, Hong, Man Chung, Moo, Mun, Quon, Wing, Yat, Bok, Chun.
Spanish, Portuguese, Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Catalan: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mar ‘sea’ (from Latin mare).
German: nickname from Middle High German mar(w) ‘tender, delicate’, or an altered form of Mahr, a topographic name from mar ‘lake, swamp, stagnant water’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton was born in 1430, in Puddletown, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Pydel, was 15. He married Elizabeth Clevedon in 1445, in Athelhampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 14 September 1485, in Athelhampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Puddletown, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton est né en 1430, à Puddletown, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pydel, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Clevedon en 1445, à Athelhampton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1485, à Athelhampton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Puddletown, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton 1430 in Puddletown, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Pydel 15. Er hat 1445 in Athelhampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Clevedon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 14. September 1485 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Athelhampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Puddletown, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton è nato il nel 1430 nel Puddletown, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Pydel, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Clevedon nel 1445, nel Athelhampton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 settembre 1485, nel Athelhampton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Puddletown, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhamptonが1430年にイギリスイギリスドールセトプウッドレトウンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhamptonは20歳，母Elizabeth Pydelは15歳であった。1445年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアスエルハンプトンでElizabeth Clevedonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1485年9月14日にイギリスイギリスドールセトアスエルハンプトンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトプウッドレトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 푸들레타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Pydel(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 앳헬함프턴에서 Elizabeth Clevedon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1485년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 앳헬함프턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 푸들레타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton nasceu em 1430, em Puddletown, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Pydel, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Clevedon em 1445, em Athelhampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1485, em Athelhampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Puddletown, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton родился в 1430 г. в местности пуддлетоун, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pydel, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Clevedon в 1445 г. в местности ателхамптон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 14 сентября 1485 г. в местности ателхамптон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности пуддлетоун, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton nació en 1430, en Puddletown, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Martin VI, Baron of Athelhampton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Pydel, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Clevedon en 1445, en Athelhampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1485, en Athelhampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Puddletown, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
